about_p1: Uhuru Community Development Project (UCDP) was founded in 2002 by Davies Okombo — a professional social worker with a vision to protect, support, and empower the most vulnerable children and families in Kisumu, Western Kenya.
about_p2: We work across Kisumu County — in the streets, schools, clinics, and communities — running programmes that address poverty, homelessness, lack of education, and social exclusion. Everything we do is rooted in respect for human dignity and a belief that every child deserves a future.
vision_quote: Every child deserves safety, education, and the chance to grow into who they are meant to be.
